description: Happy-path pickup booking flows: new requests, service selection, and providing pickup time/area details.

scenarios.customer_message: Hi, I'd like to book a laundry pickup please.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: Happy to help you book a pickup! Could you tell me which service you'd like and your pickup area?

scenarios.customer_message: I need wash and fold for a few shirts and some bedsheets.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: Got it, wash and fold noted. What's your pickup area and a convenient pickup time for you?

scenarios.customer_message: Pickup from Dubai Marina, tomorrow evening around 7pm works for me.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: Thank you! I've noted Dubai Marina and your preferred evening time. I'll confirm the details with you shortly.

scenarios.customer_message: Can you pick up two suits for dry cleaning from JLT?
scenarios.expected_short_reply: Of course! Dry cleaning for two suits from JLT. What pickup time would suit you best?

scenarios.customer_message: For my current order can you also add a pickup for some curtains?
scenarios.expected_short_reply: Sure, I can look into adding curtains to your pickup. Could you confirm the pickup area and time you'd like?
